mnemonics.title: Boolean Operators
mnemonics.content: AND means ALL must be present, OR means ANY can be present, NOT means EXCLUDE these terms

mnemonics.title: TF-IDF Components
mnemonics.content: TF = Term Frequency (in document), IDF = Inverse Document Frequency (across collection)

mnemonics.title: IR Model Evolution
mnemonics.content: Boolean → Vector → Probabilistic → Language → Neural (B-V-P-L-N progression)
